info.description: This is the core backend service for SEP490 project with authentication, user management, and business features.
info.title: SEP490 Core Backend API

post.description: Logout user and invalidate refresh token
Logout user from all active sessions
Generate new access token using refresh token

get.description: Get paginated list of brands with optional filters

post.description: Create a new brand with the associated inactive users

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of contracts with optional filters

post.description: Create a new contract and optionally update brand information

parameters.description: Contract creation data in JSON format of struct type requests.CreateContractRequest
parameters.name: data

get.description: Retrieve all contracts for a specific brand
Retrieve detailed information about a specific contract

put.description: Update an existing contract and optionally update brand information

delete.description: Soft delete a contract by ID

patch.description: Move a milestone to a target state (NOT_STARTED, ON_GOING, CANCELLED, COMPLETED)

get.description: Get paginated list of products with optional search

post.description: Create a new product (initial state DRAFT)

patch.description: Move a product to a target state (DRAFT, SUBMITTED, REVISION, APPROVED, ACTIVED, INACTIVED)

post.description: Create a new product variant with story and attributes

patch.description: Move a task to a target state (TODO, IN_PROGRESS, CANCELLED, RECAP, DONE)

get.description: Get paginated products (overview) belonging to a task. Authorization: staff roles or owning brand user.
Get paginated list of users (admin only)

parameters.description: Search term for username or email
parameters.name: search

get.description: Get user details by ID (admin only)

patch.description: Activate a user associated with a brand (admin only)

get.description: Returns the health status of the application and its dependencies
Returns whether the application is alive and running
Returns whether the application is ready to serve requests

state.description:
State is the desired target state.
Enum: NOT_STARTED,ON_GOING,CANCELLED,COMPLETED
example: ON_GOING

State is the desired target state.
Enum: DRAFT,SUBMITTED,REVISION,APPROVED,ACTIVED,INACTIVED
example: SUBMITTED

description.example: A leading manufacturer of quality products.
A leading manufacturer of quality products.

brand_tax_number.description: Brand information (stored in contract for record-keeping)

parent_contract_id.description: Parent contract (for amendments or related contracts)

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and JWT token.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
